title: Create a new triage and receive a recommendation
description: A signed-in doctor can complete the two-step triage wizard and reach a result page with a score and clinical recommendation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /triage/new
Fill in the patient profile and baseline clinical data with valid values
Proceed to the I-NEED-HELP checklist step
Select the relevant triage criteria to complete the assessment
Submit the triage
Verify the triage result page is displayed
Verify a score and recommendation are visible

title: Complete a new triage and receive a recommendation
description: This verifies that a doctor can enter baseline patient data, score the I-NEED-HELP criteria, submit the triage, and see a final score and recommendation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /triage/new
Fill in the patient initials field
Fill in a valid age into the age field
Select a gender value
Fill in valid systolic blood pressure, diastolic blood pressure, heart rate, and LVEF values
Fill in the required baseline comorbidity and GDMT fields
Continue to the I-NEED-HELP scoring step
Select at least one I-NEED-HELP criterion
Submit the triage form
Verify the triage result is displayed
Verify a final score and recommendation are displayed

title: Log in and reach the dashboard
description: A registered doctor can sign in successfully and land on the personal dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the dashboard is displayed
Verify personal registry summary content is visible

title: Block progression when required triage fields are missing
description: This verifies that incomplete baseline triage data is rejected and inline validation errors are shown instead of advancing to scoring.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /triage/new
Leave the required baseline fields empty
Continue to the I-NEED-HELP scoring step
Verify inline validation errors are displayed
Verify the scoring step is not shown

title: Delete the signed-in account from settings
description: A signed-in doctor can permanently delete their own account after typing the required confirmation phrase.
category: Settings - Profile, Change Password, Ethical Clearance, Delete Account

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open settings
Choose to delete the account
Type the required account deletion confirmation phrase
Confirm account deletion
Verify the account is deleted and patient data is removed

title: Refer a patient when high-risk triage criteria are selected
description: A completed triage with high-risk criteria shows a referral recommendation on the result page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /triage/new
Fill in the patient profile and baseline clinical data with valid values
Proceed to the I-NEED-HELP checklist step
Select enough triage criteria to trigger referral
Submit the triage
Verify the referral recommendation is visible
Verify the triage score is displayed

title: Approve a pending doctor account
description: This verifies that an admin can review a pending doctor account and approve it for access.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/users
Approve a pending doctor account
Verify the doctor account is marked as approved
Verify the pending account is removed from the pending list

title: Record a 30-day outcome for a patient
description: This verifies that a doctor can enter follow-up outcome information for a patient and save it successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open an existing patient record
Open the follow-up outcome form
Select a valid 30-day outcome
Fill in valid admission and discharge dates if required
Save the follow-up outcome
Verify the follow-up outcome is displayed on the patient record
Verify the patient is no longer marked as pending follow-up

title: Create a new triage event for an existing patient
description: A doctor can retriage an existing patient and see a new I-NEED-HELP assessment added to the record.
category: Patient Detail, Edit, Delete, Finalize, Retriage

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to view the patient registry
Open a patient record
Choose to retriage the patient
Complete the I-NEED-HELP assessment for the patient
Verify a new triage event is added to the record

title: Keep triage on GDMT when no referral criteria are met
description: A completed triage with no high-risk criteria shows a continue-GDMT recommendation on the result page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /triage/new
Fill in the patient profile and baseline clinical data with valid values
Proceed to the I-NEED-HELP checklist step
Leave all triage criteria unselected
Submit the triage
Verify the continue GDMT recommendation is visible
Verify the criteria summary reflects a low-risk assessment

title: Update the live triage score as criteria are selected
description: This verifies that selecting I-NEED-HELP criteria updates the live score before submission and that the score reflects the selected criteria.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /triage/new
Fill in the required baseline patient data
Continue to the I-NEED-HELP scoring step
Select one I-NEED-HELP criterion
Select another I-NEED-HELP criterion
Verify the live triage score updates
Verify the selected criteria are reflected in the scoring step

title: Record a valid 30-day follow-up outcome
description: A signed-in doctor can submit a follow-up outcome with valid admission and discharge dates and see the saved outcome.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /followup
Open a patient needing follow-up
Select a valid 30-day outcome
Fill in valid admission and discharge dates
Save the follow-up outcome
Verify the follow-up outcome is saved
Verify the patient moves to the completed follow-up state

title: Lock a patient record by finalizing it

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to view the patient registry
Open a patient record
Choose to finalize the record
Confirm finalization
Verify the record is locked from further edits

title: Generate a referral recommendation when criteria are met
description: This verifies that selecting qualifying I-NEED-HELP criteria produces a referral recommendation on the result page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /triage/new
Fill in the required baseline patient data
Continue to the I-NEED-HELP scoring step
Select qualifying I-NEED-HELP criteria
Submit the triage form
Verify the triage result is displayed
Verify a referral recommendation is displayed

title: View a patient record with full clinical history

title: Save a follow-up outcome for a patient
description: A doctor can record a 30-day outcome for a patient and see it saved in the follow-up workflow.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open follow-up tracking
Open a patient follow-up update flow

Verify the outcome is saved for the patient

title: Finalize a patient record and lock further editing
description: A signed-in doctor can finalize a patient record and the record becomes locked from further baseline edits.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /patients
Open a patient record
Finalize the record
Verify the record is marked as finalized
Verify editing is no longer available

title: Change the account password from settings
description: A signed-in doctor can change their own password from settings and complete the update successfully.
category: Settings - Profile, Change Password, Ethical Clearance, Delete Account

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open settings
Fill in the current password field
Fill in the new password field with a valid password
Fill in the password confirmation field with the same password
Submit the password change
Verify the password change succeeds

title: Generate a continue-GDMT recommendation for a zero score triage
description: This verifies that a triage with no criteria met produces a zero score and a continue-GDMT recommendation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /triage/new
Fill in the required baseline patient data
Continue to the I-NEED-HELP scoring step
Leave all I-NEED-HELP criteria unselected
Submit the triage form
Verify the triage result is displayed
Verify a zero score and continue-GDMT recommendation are displayed

title: Register a new doctor account with consent
description: A new doctor can complete registration with required identity and consent details and reach an account created pending approval state.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill in the name field with a valid full name
Fill in the email field with a valid email address
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Select a valid institution type
Optionally fill in the institution name field
Check the consent checkbox
Submit the registration form
Verify the account creation confirmation is visible
Verify the pending approval state is visible

title: Reset another doctor's password as an admin
description: This verifies that an admin can generate a temporary password for another doctor account and see the reset confirmation in the interface.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/users
Reset another doctor's password
Verify a temporary password confirmation is displayed
Verify the selected doctor remains listed in account management

title: Update a patient baseline record before finalization
description: A doctor can edit a patient's baseline information and save the revised record before it is locked.
category: Patient Detail, Edit, Delete, Finalize, Retriage

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to view the patient registry
Open a patient record
Choose to edit the patient baseline data
Change one or more editable baseline fields
Save the updated patient record
Verify the patient record reflects the saved updates

title: Search and filter the patient registry
description: A signed-in doctor can search and filter the patient list to find matching records.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /patients
Search for a patient using a likely matching term
Apply a registry filter
Verify the filtered patient list is displayed
Verify matching patient results remain visible

title: Delete a patient record from the registry

Submit the login form

title: Reset another doctor’s password and reveal the temporary password
description: An admin can reset another doctor's password from the doctor management page and the temporary password is revealed once for sharing out of band.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to the doctor management page
Click the password reset control for another doctor account
Confirm the password reset
Verify a temporary password is displayed
Verify the reset action is reflected for that account

title: Review dashboard metrics and go to the patient list

Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form

Submit the login form

Submit the login form
